footer.tagline: A fictional alliance for better shark-human relations. Every sale funds real ocean conservation.
footer.aboutText: The Shark Human Alliance is a playful fictional universe with a dead-serious mission: turn fear into curiosity, fund real conservation, and give sharks the PR they deserve.
footer.legalText: Fictional brand. Real donations. Your certificate provides zero marine protection but helps protect actual sharks from us.
footer.transparencyText: Full transparency on every dollar. Reports published quarterly once donations begin.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Shark Human Alliance. A fictional brand with a very real mission.

hero.brandLine: Sharks deserve better PR. And real protection.
hero.description: A personalized, surprisingly official-looking certificate. The perfect gag gift for anyone who's ever side-eyed the ocean.
hero.finnleyDesc: Press spokesperson. Slightly offended by Hollywood.
hero.imageAlt: Finnley Mako and Luna Reef — the Alliance ambassadors

items.text: Bought a certificate yesterday. Went diving today. A passing shark looked at me and just... nodded. Coincidence? I think not.
items.author: Mike T.

items.text: Got this for my husband as a joke. He framed it, hung it in his office, and now introduces himself as a 'shark diplomat' at parties.
items.author: Sarah K.

items.text: Best gag gift I've ever given. My friend is now genuinely convinced sharks can sense her Protected status.
items.author: Jake R.

items.text: I've been swimming with sharks for 20 years. Not once have I been eaten. I'm attributing this entirely to my certificate.
items.author: Diana L.

items.text: Gave this to my dad for his birthday. He carries a photo of it in his wallet. Next to his actual driver's license.
items.author: Tom H.

realImpact.forSharksText: Every sale funds verified ocean and shark conservation organizations. No vague promises, no mystery fees. Business certificates donate 70%.
realImpact.forHumanText: The rest keeps the servers running and the founder fed. Think of it as funding the Alliance's land-based operations department (staff: one very tired person).
realImpact.transparencyNote: Full transparency on every dollar. Reports published quarterly once donations begin. If a shark could read a spreadsheet, they would approve.

items.question: Is the alliance real?
items.answer: The alliance is fictional and intentionally humorous. The conservation donations are real and verifiable.

items.question: Does membership protect me from sharks?
items.answer: No. Your certificate provides zero marine protection. It does, however, help protect actual sharks from us.

items.question: Where does the money actually go?
items.answer: Every sale funds verified ocean and shark conservation organizations. We publish quarterly reports showing exactly where the money went — reports begin once the first donations are made.

items.question: Why sharks?
items.answer: Humans kill an estimated 100 million sharks per year. Human fatalities from sharks remain in the single digits. They need better PR, and they need real help. We do both.

items.question: Will I receive a certificate?
items.answer: Yes. A personalized digital certificate with your name, membership tier, and an air of surprisingly official diplomatic recognition. Delivered instantly.

items.question: Can I give this as a gift?
items.answer: Absolutely. Protected Friend Status is the most popular gift option — funny enough to share, polished enough to frame.

faqPage.label: FAQ
faqPage.title: Everything you need to know.
faqPage.subtitle: Clarifications for sensible humans who want to understand what they're buying, where the money goes, and whether sharks can actually read certificates.

items.question: Is the alliance real?
items.answer: The alliance is fictional and intentionally humorous. The conservation donations are real and verifiable. Think of it as a comedy show where the ticket price goes to charity.

items.question: Does membership protect me from sharks?
items.answer: No. Your certificate provides zero marine protection. It does, however, help protect actual sharks from us. Which, statistically, is the direction protection is actually needed.

items.question: Where does the money actually go?
items.answer: Every sale funds verified ocean and shark conservation organizations including Shark Trust, Oceana, Shark Conservation Fund, and Malpelo Foundation. We publish quarterly reports showing exactly where the money went — reports begin once the first donations are made.

items.question: Why sharks?
items.answer: Humans kill an estimated 100 million sharks per year. Human fatalities from sharks remain in the single digits in most years. They need better PR, and they need real help. We do both — one surprisingly official-looking certificate at a time.

items.question: Will I receive a certificate?
items.answer: Yes. A personalized digital certificate with your name, membership tier, and an air of surprisingly official diplomatic recognition. Delivered instantly to your email.

items.question: Can I give this as a gift?
items.answer: Absolutely. Protected Friend Status is the most popular gift option — funny enough to share, polished enough to frame. You can add a recipient email, delivery date, and personal message during checkout.

items.question: How much goes to conservation?
items.answer: For personal certificates (Protected Friend, Non-Snack), 50% goes directly to conservation. For business certificates (Shark-Approved Zone), it's 70%. The rest keeps the servers running and the founder fed.

items.question: Is this tax-deductible?
items.answer: No. This is a purchase of a humorous digital product, not a charitable donation. The conservation funding happens on our end — you get a certificate and the warm glow of knowing you helped sharks.

items.question: How big is the certificate?
items.answer: Certificates are optimized for A4 (for the rest of the world) or US Letter (for the USA) — you choose when downloading. Large enough to conceal the fact that sharks cannot read, but small enough to fit into a standard frame you can buy from us here on land.

faqPage.ctaText: The best way to understand the certificate is to see it. Try the live preview on our homepage — or just go for it.

membershipPage.title: Choose your shark diplomacy level.
membershipPage.description: Every membership tier is fictional, humorous, and designed to feel oddly official. The goal is simple: better shark-human vibes, better gifts, and dramatically improved symbolic relations.
membershipPage.tiersTitle: Choose your level of shark diplomacy.
membershipPage.tiersDescription: Pick the tier that matches your gifting ambition and desired level of symbolic prestige.
membershipPage.protectedDescription: The strongest core offer: a humorous, polished and giftable symbolic status inside the alliance.
membershipPage.nonsnackDescription: A more absurd prestige tier for humans who would strongly prefer not to be considered menu-adjacent.
membershipPage.businessDescription: For any business brave enough to claim official shark approval. Display the certificate proudly. Sharks love good interior design. 70% of this tier goes to conservation.
membershipPage.businessCertText: has been officially designated as a Shark-Approved Zone by the Shark Human Alliance
membershipPage.step1Text: Choose the version that best matches the gift, joke intensity, and symbolic prestige you want.
membershipPage.step2Text: Add the recipient name and optional dedication so the membership feels like a real gift, not just a joke.
membershipPage.step3Text: The recipient receives an official-looking alliance document and a major boost in shark diplomacy aesthetics.
membershipPage.clarificationTitle: This is a fictional symbolic product.
membershipPage.clarificationText: Membership in the Shark Human Alliance does not provide legal, physical, spiritual, maritime, biological, emotional, or anti-bite protection. It is a humorous product concept designed for gifts, certificates and brand storytelling.

faqItems.question: Is this a real protective product?
faqItems.answer: No. All memberships are fictional, symbolic, and intended as humorous gifts or fan-style participation in the Shark Human Alliance universe.

faqItems.question: Will I receive something after payment?
faqItems.answer: Yes. A personalized digital certificate delivered instantly to your email.

faqItems.question: Why does the page talk about protection if it is fictional?
faqItems.answer: Because the humor of the project is built around symbolic shark diplomacy. The joke works only if it remains clearly playful and obviously non-literal.

faqItems.question: Which option should I pick?
faqItems.answer: Protected Friend Status ($5) is the most popular — it's the perfect balance between funny, polished and giftable.

membershipPage.joinTitle: Get someone their Protected Friend Status.
membershipPage.joinText: The most popular gift in the alliance. Funny, polished, and delivered instantly.

protectedPage.title: Protected Friend Status
protectedPage.description: A symbolic recognition tier for humans who deserve a slightly warmer reception from sharks and a significantly more official-looking certificate.
protectedPage.recommended: Recommended as the core launch product for Shark Human Alliance.
protectedPage.bestUseText: This is the best tier for gifting, brand clarity and certificate-led monetization.
protectedPage.whyTitle: Funny enough to be shareable. Clean enough to feel premium.
protectedPage.whyDescription: Protected Friend Status sits exactly where the concept works best: clearly humorous, clearly fictional, but still polished enough to feel like a real gift product rather than a throwaway joke.
protectedPage.reason1Text: The name is funny, but still readable and gift-worthy.
protectedPage.reason2Text: It naturally supports a personalized certificate and recognition badge.
protectedPage.reason3Text: If only one paid product exists at launch, it should probably be this one.
protectedPage.buyTitle: Next step: connect this page to checkout.
protectedPage.buyText: For now this is a polished product detail page. The next build step will be adding a purchase button, then checkout, then certificate personalization.

faqItems.question: Is this actual protection from sharks?
faqItems.answer: No. Protected Friend Status is a fictional symbolic product and does not provide real-world protection of any kind.

faqItems.question: Why is this the main product?
faqItems.answer: Because it is the clearest balance between funny, polished and giftable.

faqItems.question: What happens after purchase?
faqItems.answer: You receive a personalized digital certificate delivered instantly to your email.

purchase.title: Proceed to Diplomatic Clearance.
purchase.subtitle: One form. One payment. One step closer to not being a snack.
purchase.nameLabel: Full name of the future diplomat
purchase.giftToggle: This is a gift for someone
purchase.dedicationPlaceholder: e.g. For surviving every beach vacation since 1987
purchase.emailOptionalHint: If you skip this, your certificate can only be downloaded immediately after purchase and cannot be retrieved later.
purchase.noEmailWarningText: Without an email address, your certificate will only be available for download immediately after payment. There is no way to retrieve it later.
purchase.stripeSecureNote: Sharks can't read card numbers — your payment info is safe. You'll be redirected to Stripe's secure checkout.
purchase.checkoutError: Something went wrong creating your checkout. Please try again.
purchase.canceledNotice: Your payment was canceled. No worries — your form data is still here. Ready when you are!
purchase.successLoading: Confirming your payment with Stripe — this usually takes just a moment.
purchase.successPendingText: Your payment was successful, but we're still processing your certificate. It should arrive in your email shortly. If not, please contact us.
purchase.successText: Your symbolic status has been registered. The sharks have been notified (symbolically).
purchase.viewRegistry: See yourself in the Diplomatic Registry
purchase.emailSentAutomatic: A certificate email has been sent to your inbox automatically. Check spam if you don't see it!
purchase.giftMessagePlaceholder: e.g. Happy birthday! Now the sharks know you're off the menu.
purchase.referredByBadge: You were referred by a fellow diplomat. Welcome to the Alliance!
purchase.referralText: Share your referral link with friends. Every recruit moves you up the ranks.

registry.title: The Diplomatic Registry
registry.subtitle: An official-ish record of every human who has achieved symbolic recognition from sharks.
registry.description: All individuals listed below have been formally assessed and declared unsuitable for shark consumption. This determination is entirely symbolic, legally meaningless, and scientifically unverified. Sharks have been notified (they did not respond).
registry.loadingText: Searching the oceanic archives... Careful, some records may have been nibbled.
registry.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, referral code, or registry ID...
registry.searchNoResults: No diplomats match your search. They might be hiding from sharks.
registry.emptyState: No one is officially uneaten yet. Someone has to be first.
registry.emptyStateFounders: Founding diplomats will appear here. Be the first.
registry.viralWantedDesc: Billions of humans remain without any form of symbolic shark protection. Know someone who needs diplomatic clearance? Gift them a certificate before it's too late (symbolically).
registry.viralRecruitersDesc: These diplomats have recruited the most humans into the Alliance. Finnley Mako personally reads their names out loud (allegedly).
registry.verifyDescription: Enter a Registry ID or referral code to verify someone's diplomatic status. Found on every certificate and QR code.
registry.verifyNotFound: No record found. Either this ID doesn't exist, or the sharks ate the paperwork.
registry.verifyError: Something went wrong. The oceanic archives may be temporarily flooded.
registry.careerPromoDesc: Every diplomat starts as a Civilian. Refer friends, rise through the ranks, and maybe — just maybe — Finnley Mako will learn your name. From Intern to Chief Whisperer, your career in shark diplomacy awaits.
registry.disclaimerText: This registry provides no legal, marine, or nutritional status. Inclusion does not reduce your statistical likelihood of being a shark's lunch. It does, however, make you part of a very exclusive list of people who paid money to be told they are not food.

verifySample.title: This is a preview certificate
verifySample.description: You scanned a QR code from a sample certificate. This is not a real membership — yet. The sharks are watching and mildly judging your hesitation.
verifySample.quip: Our diplomatic intelligence suggests you are exactly the kind of person who should have one of these. The fact that you scanned a sample QR code proves you are thorough, cautious, and possibly a little paranoid about sharks. All excellent qualities.
verifySample.disclaimer: No actual shark diplomacy was verified during this interaction. But it could be. Easily. For $5.

certificate.photoTagline: Don't worry, sharks are your friends now.
certificate.subtitle: Shark Human Alliance | Bureau of Not Being Eaten
certificate.certTitle: CERTIFICATE OF DIPLOMATIC PROTECTION FROM SHARK ENCOUNTERS
certificate.certifies: This document officially certifies that the esteemed
certificate.statusLabel: has been granted the status of
certificate.body: on the basis of an in-depth diplomatic inquiry and sensory analysis (strictly symbolic), the above-named individual has been declared entirely unsuitable for shark consumption anywhere in the world.
certificate.reasonsLabel: The Alliance has determined that the holder is
reasons: fundamentally unappetizing (confirmed by three independent shark focus groups).
dangerously high in caffeine and microplastics, known to cause shark insomnia.
a very, very good belly rubber, and therefore too valuable to eat.
smelling suspiciously of sunscreen and existential regret.
too crunchy for comfort (sharks strongly prefer smooth textures).
exhibiting chronic flailing behavior in water, which confuses sonar.
a suspected fish whisperer and potential double agent.
of negligible nutritional value but surprisingly high entertainment value.
certificate.privileges: The holder may enter the ocean knowing that any shark who would consider them a meal would be regarded as an individual with very poor judgment.
certificate.validityNote: Validity: Lifetime (or until you start smelling like tuna).
certificate.sig1Title: Chief Diplomat SHA & Press Spokesperson (and Optimist)
certificate.sig2Title: Head of Culinary Inspection & Dept. of Misunderstanding Prevention
certificate.sealText: IN SHARKS WE TRUST (TO NOT EAT US)
certificate.disclaimer: Shark Legal Dept. Notice: This certificate is 100% fictional and guarantees absolutely no protection, primarily because sharks cannot read. Sharks were not invited to negotiations and are likely unaware of your existence.
certificate.nonsnackSubtitle: Office of Interspecies Diplomatic Affairs & Culinary Diplomacy
certificate.nonsnackBody: has, following an in-depth diplomatic inquiry and sensory analysis (strictly symbolic), been declared a being entirely unsuitable for shark consumption anywhere in the world.
certificate.nonsnackReasonsLabel: The SHA Prey Assessment Committee has concluded that the holder is
nonsnackReasons: carrying excessive caffeine and stress hormones, known to cause shark anxiety and insomnia.
of desperately low fat content — nutritionally uninteresting with a bone-choking hazard.
emitting a cheap sunscreen aroma that is culinarily offensive to sensitive shark noses.
overall too tough, with a consistency that causes premature jaw fatigue.
leaving a suspicious aftertaste of processed food and screen radiation.
generating an off-putting amount of body heat from chronic overthinking.
certificate.nonsnackPrivileges: The holder may enter the ocean knowing that any shark considering them a snack would be regarded as an individual with very poor taste within the Alliance.
certificate.nonsnackDisclaimer: Disclaimer: This recognition is purely symbolic. Most sharks unfortunately cannot read and some may actually like caffeine. The Alliance does not vouch for encounters with gourmet sharks who ignore bureaucracy. Entering the water remains at your own risk.
certificate.businessBody: has been officially recognized as a supporter of constructive shark dialogue and harmonious coexistence in oceanic space. This zone is declared safe for all forms of business not in conflict with the interests (or culinary preferences) of the Alliance.
businessReasons: zero culinary provocations — no menu items questioning shark existence.
proper image promotion — absolutely no Jaws screenings on the premises.
diligent beach care, ensuring sharks do not suffer stomach issues from litter.
granting symbolic Non-Snack status to all employees, automatically and irrevocably.
maintaining zero shark fin products on premises (obviously).
providing free Wi-Fi for visiting marine diplomats.
certificate.businessPrivileges: The holder of this license is entitled to free consultations with ambassadors Finnley Mako and Luna Reef (if they ever approach you).
certificate.businessDisclaimer: Disclaimer: This certificate is purely symbolic. Sharks are not bound by any Alliance agreements and may have their own culinary preferences. The license does not vouch for encounters with sharks who disrespect bureaucracy. Entering the water and operating your business remain at your own risk.

impact.label: Our Impact
impact.title: Where the money actually goes.
impact.subtitle: The alliance is fictional. The conservation funding is not. Here's exactly how every dollar is split, tracked, and reported.
impact.splitDescription: Every certificate sold generates a direct contribution to ocean conservation. The amount depends on which tier you choose.
impact.splitProtectedText: $1 from every Protected Friend sale goes directly to vetted shark and ocean conservation organizations. Small certificate, real impact.
impact.splitNonsnackText: $12 of every Non-Snack sale funds conservation. That's nearly two-thirds of the price doing genuine good in the ocean.
impact.splitBusinessText: $70 of every business certification goes to conservation — because organizations that hang certificates on walls should make them count.
impact.splitOpsText: The rest funds the critically unglamorous work of keeping the Alliance afloat on dry land: servers, hosting, certificate rendering, and one human who does all of this in a bathrobe. No sharks were consulted on the budget.
impact.partnersSubtitle: These are the organizations we aim to support. Each has been selected for their direct impact on shark conservation, scientific research, and ocean protection.
impact.partner1Desc: UK-based charity dedicated to safeguarding the future of sharks through science, education and policy influence.
impact.partner1Focus: Focus: UK & European shark policy, science-led conservation, public education campaigns.
impact.partner2Desc: The largest international organization focused solely on ocean conservation, with campaigns in dozens of countries.
impact.partner2Focus: Focus: Policy change, ocean habitat protection, sustainable fisheries advocacy.
impact.partner3Desc: Philanthropic collaboration providing direct funding for shark and ray conservation globally.
impact.partner3Focus: Focus: Research grants, marine protected areas, anti-finning campaigns.
impact.partner4Desc: Protecting marine fauna and one of the world's most important shark sanctuaries off Colombia's Pacific coast.
impact.partner4Focus: Focus: Malpelo Island sanctuary protection, hammerhead shark research, marine patrols.
impact.partnersDisclaimer: Listed as planned partners. Formal partnerships will be established and announced as donation volume begins. We will not claim a partnership until it is confirmed.
impact.selectionCriteria1Text: The organization must work directly on shark conservation, research, or habitat protection — not general marine causes.
impact.selectionCriteria2Text: They must publish annual reports, financial statements, or verifiable impact metrics that we can share with our community.
impact.selectionCriteria3Text: We prioritize organizations with years of documented conservation outcomes, not just good intentions.
impact.selectionCriteria4Text: We aim for a mix of global organizations and local sanctuaries to ensure funding reaches where it's needed most.
impact.reportingSubtitle: Every dollar is tracked and reported. If a shark could read a spreadsheet, they would approve.
impact.reporting1Text: Published publicly on this page. How much was raised, where it went, and what impact it had.
impact.reporting2Text: Every donation comes with receipts and confirmation from the receiving organization.
impact.reporting3Text: Email updates to all certificate holders showing exactly how their purchase contributed.
impact.preReportTitle: We haven't published our first report yet
impact.preReportText: The Shark Human Alliance is still in its early stages. Reports will be published quarterly once donation volume is sufficient to make meaningful contributions. We'd rather wait and donate something substantial than spread tiny amounts too thin. This page will be updated with our first impact report as soon as it's ready.
impact.ctaText: The joke is fictional. The funding is real. Get a certificate and help protect the sharks who definitely aren't plotting anything.

wanted.label: Alliance Security Bureau
wanted.title: Someone you know is still unprotected.
wanted.subtitle: Generate a Wanted poster. Share it. Then gift them the protection they clearly need.
wanted.formSubtitle: Enter the name of someone who lacks official shark diplomatic status. We'll handle the rest.
wanted.formDisclaimer: No humans were harmed in the making of this poster. Sharks remain indifferent to your existence.
charges: Entering sovereign shark waters without a passport, visa, or basic manners
Suspiciously resembling a seal on at least three confirmed occasions
Zero attempts at inter-species diplomacy despite ample opportunity
Chronic refusal to acknowledge the Shark High Council
Swimming with reckless confidence and absolutely no credentials
Willful failure to register with the Shark Diplomatic Registry
Possession of an unprotected beach towel in a restricted zone
Repeated fish consumption without prior Alliance authorization
Maintaining a suspicious and total absence of shark-related paperwork
Observed flailing in shallow water — a documented act of provocation
Smelling vaguely of tuna, which constitutes an unauthorized attractant
Publicly claiming Jaws is a 'great movie' (classified as anti-shark propaganda)
wanted.rewardText: One official certificate + eternal gratitude from sharks
wanted.shareText: {name} has been identified as an unprotected human. Do the right thing.
wanted.viralPrompt: Share it on Instagram Stories, send it in a group chat, or print it and tape it to their desk.
wanted.viralSubtext: Every poster shared is a step toward universal shark-human diplomatic coverage.
wanted.howStep1Text: Enter their name. We'll create a shareable poster declaring their unprotected status.
wanted.howStep2Text: Post it on Stories, drop it in the group chat, or tape it to their monitor. Maximum embarrassment encouraged.
wanted.howStep3Text: Resolve the situation by gifting them an official Protected Friend certificate. Diplomacy restored.

checkRank.notFound: Hmm, that code wasn't found in our oceanic archives. Double-check and try again.

howWorks.label: How It Works
howWorks.title: Three steps to shark diplomatic glory.
howWorks.step1Text: Buy any tier. You'll receive a unique referral code and a shareable link.
howWorks.step2Text: Send it to friends, post it on social media, or print it on a T-shirt. We don't judge.
howWorks.step3Text: Every friend who joins through your link earns you a referral. Hit the thresholds, unlock new ranks.

cta.title: Start your Alliance career.
cta.text: Every career in shark diplomacy starts with a single certificate. Get yours now and receive your personal referral code.
